descriptions.acl_list: List all zone-transfer ACLs on the account. Takes no parameters. Returns an array of TransferACL objects, each with a numeric id and name. Use this to discover ACL ids before calling acl_get or acl_delete.
descriptions.acl_delete: Delete a zone-transfer ACL by its numeric id (required, path parameter). Permanently removes the ACL and is not reversible — destructive. Call acl_list first to find the id.
descriptions.folders_list: List all security folders on the account. Takes no parameters. Returns an array of Folder objects, each with a numeric id, name, and defaultFolder flag. Use this to find folder ids before calling folders_get.
descriptions.templates_list: List all DNS record templates on the account. Takes no parameters. Returns an array of Template objects, each with a numeric id, name, and publicTemplate flag. Use this to discover template ids before calling templates_get, templates_update, or templates_delete.
descriptions.templates_delete: Delete a DNS record template by its numeric id (required, path parameter). Permanently removes the template and its records, and is not reversible — destructive. Call templates_list first to find the id.
